Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from autoresearch.experiment import ExperimentConfig; c = ExperimentConfig.load\('autoresearch/experiments/01_fsppo_higher_entropy.yaml'\); print\(f'Loaded: {c.name}'\); print\(f'Model: {c.model_type}'\); print\(f'Steps: {c.total_timesteps:,}'\); print\(f'Train script: {c.train_script}'\); print\(f'CLI args: {\\" \\".join\(c.to_train_args\(\)\)}'\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
from autoresearch.experiment import ExperimentConfig
c = ExperimentConfig.load\('autoresearch/experiments/01_fsppo_higher_entropy.json'\)
print\(f'Loaded: {c.name}'\)
print\(f'Model: {c.model_type}'\)
print\(f'Steps: {c.total_timesteps:,}'\)
print\(f'Train script: {c.train_script}'\)
print\(f'CLI args: {chr\(10\).join\([\\"\\"] + c.to_train_args\(\)\)}'\)
")

n = count_queued_experiments\('autoresearch/queue'\)

")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import json
with open\('training_output/autoresearch/20260314_122957_fsppo_higher_entropy/config.json'\) as f:
    d = json.load\(f\)
for k in ['gpu_cost_per_hour','gpu_type','estimated_hours','estimated_cost','actual_hours','actual_cost','cost_efficiency','status']:
    print\(f'{k}: {d.get\(k\)}'\)
")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
from autoresearch.cloud.worker import WORKER_ID, USE_FEATURE_BRANCHES
print\(f'Worker: {WORKER_ID}'\)
print\(f'Feature branches: {USE_FEATURE_BRANCHES}'\)

from autoresearch.cloud.costs import CostTracker, Budget
import json
with open\('autoresearch/budget.json'\) as f:
    b = Budget\(**json.load\(f\)\)
t = CostTracker\(b\)
ok, reason = t.can_launch\(0.35\)
print\(f'Can launch @ \\$0.35/hr: {ok} \({reason}\)'\)
print\('All imports OK'\)
")
Bash(find .venv/Lib/site-packages -name "torch" -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs -I {} cat {}/version.py 2>/dev/null || echo "Checking differently...")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
from control_mamba.mamba_fast import FastMambaBlock, HAS_MAMBA_SSM
print\(f'mamba-ssm installed: {HAS_MAMBA_SSM}'\)
block = FastMambaBlock\(d_model=64, d_state=16, d_conv=4, expand=2\)
print\(f'Created block \(using fast path: {block._use_fast}\)'\)
print\(f'Fallback to pure PyTorch: {not block._use_fast}'\)
" 2>&1)
